channel.title: Events on BRB Robotics | FTC Team 26502 | Charlottesville, Virginia
channel.description: Recent content in Events on BRB Robotics | FTC Team 26502 | Charlottesville, Virginia

item.title: 2026 3D Printing Workshops
item.description: Workshop Overview Time: 1:30 PM - 2:30 PM Dates: Sunday, March 8, 2026; Sunday, April 12, 2026; Sunday, May 10, 2026 For: Grades 3-5 (families welcome) Where: Blue Ridge Boost: 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville, VA 22903 Entry Fee: Paid registration (see sign-up buttons below) How to Attend: Registration required (no drop-ins) Description Join BRB Robotics (FTC Team 26502) for a hands-on 3D Printing Workshop designed for students in grades 3–5.

item.title: 2026 Open Practices
item.description: Open Practice (Watch + Q&A) Overview Time: 1:30 PM - 2:30 PM Date: Sunday, March 1, 2026; Sunday, April 5, 2026; Sunday, May 3, 2026 For: Grades 3-5 (families welcome) Where: 2117 Ivy Road, Charlottesville, VA Entry Fee: Free How to Attend: Drop-in Open Practice (Watch + Q&A) Description Come watch BRB Robotics during a post-season open practice.

item.title: FLL Explore Teams
item.description: FLL Explore Teams — Archaeology Overview Theme: Archaeology When: Every Sunday starting March 29, 2026 till the competition Sunday May 24, 2026 Time: 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM Where: 2171 Ivy Road, Charlottesville, VA Who: Ages 7–9 (typically grades 2–4) Teams: 3–4 teams of 3–4 students each Capacity: 12–16 students total Coaching: Coached by our FTC team Showcase: May (date TBD) What It Is Students learn teamwork and basic engineering with LEGO-based robotics and a themed project.

item.title: FLL Unearthed Challenge Camp
item.description: What It Is Students spend a full week learning robot building, programming, robot game strategy, and teamwork — all on the real FLL Unearthed field.

item.title: FLL Explore Expo
item.description: Come check out our local FIRST Lego League (FLL) scrimmage, where teams will battle it out in an exciting robot game!

item.title: Robotics Building Workshop
item.description: FTC Robotics Camp Overview Time: 1 pm - 5 pm Date: 10, 17, 24 of August Max participants: 6 Age: 7-10th graders Entry Fee: $150 FTC Robotics Camp Schedule Day 1: Build the Basic Drivebase 1:00 PM – 1:30 PM: Arrival and Icebreaker 1:30 PM – 2:45 PM: Building Session 1 2:45 PM – 3:00 PM: Break 3:00 PM – 4:00 PM: Build Session 2 Day 2: Test and Modify Drivebase 1:00 PM – 1:15 PM: Arrival and Recap 1:15 PM – 1:30 PM: Introduction to Testing 1:30 PM – 2:30 PM: Testing Session 2:30 PM – 2:45 PM: Break 2:45 PM – 3:30 PM: Modification Session 3:30 PM – 4:00 PM: Final Testing Day 3: Compete on the Obstacle Course 1:00 PM – 1:15 PM: Arrival and Final Preparations 1:15 PM – 1:30 PM: Obstacle Course Overview 1:30 PM – 2:30 PM: Practice Runs 2:30 PM – 2:45 PM: Break 2:45 PM – 3:30 PM: Competition Time 3:30 PM – 4:00 PM: Wrap-Up and Celebration All funds from workshop sign-ups will go directly to supporting FTC Team 26502, BRB Robotics.

item.title: Build, Code, Compete! Lego Robotics
item.description: Build, Code, Compete! Lego Robotics Overview Time: 1 pm - 4 pm Date: 9, 16, 23 of August Max participants: 10 Ages: 8-12 Entry Fee: $199.
